name: Soysprouts Sald with Mangos and Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the soysprouts and remove any wilted ends by gently squeezing out excess water.
2. Wash the carrots and peel them, then cut into fine strips.
3. Cut the almonds into fine strips.
4. Peel the mango and cut the fruit flesh into strips away from the pit.
5. In a bowl, combine vinegar, salt, oil, pear juice, and Tabasco. Stir until well mixed.
6. Add the prepared fruits and vegetables to the dressing and let stand for 10 minutes.
7. Chop the chives into fine ribbons.
8. Sprinkle chopped chives and almonds over the salad before serving.
